en: But I got better since you got gone I'm still a few too many on a Friday night
ko: 하지만 네가 떠난 뒤로 나아졌어, 아직 금요일 밤에 좀 과하긴 하지만

en: Still try to step in when it ain't my fight I'm to me, don't get me wrong
ko: 내 싸움이 아닌데도 끼어들려 하고, 오해하지 마

en: But I got better since you got gone
Swear it was like I've been damned I found a fact of being who I am
ko: 저주받은 것 같았지만, 나 자신이 되는 법을 찾았어

en: When we were over it was overnight Light came on, it all felt right when it all went wrong
ko: 우리가 끝났을 때 하룻밤 사이에, 모든 게 잘못됐을 때 빛이 켜졌고 다 괜찮아졌어

en: You turned me loose, wasn't up till I knew what to turn into
ko: 넌 나를 풀어줬어, 뭐가 될지 알기 전까진 못 일어났지

en: But it turns out me and you together's why it took so long
ko: 결국 너와 내가 함께였기에 그렇게 오래 걸린 거였어

en: Cause I got better since you got gone
